---
title: "7) Color 3 - Design Considerations"
---


## This Week: 

In this week, we'll talk about good data viz practices.

What things should you pay attention when looking at a graphic?

How can you make a graphic less distracting from the data being represented?


<br>


### 🎯 Objectives

At the end of this unit you will be able to:

1.  Explain the importance of using pre-attentive attributes to guide the user.

2.  Apply Gestalt principles to design good visualizations.


<br>


### 🌠 Slides

Find today's slides [here.](slides.html)


### 💻 Code

TBA


<br>


### 📖 Assignment

__Reading__: _We Still Don’t Believe How Much Things Cost (WSJ)_

<a href="https://www.wsj.com/economy/consumers/grocery-prices-inflation-coffee-milk-903aead6" target="_blank">https://www.wsj.com/economy/consumers/grocery-prices-inflation-coffee-milk-903aead6</a>

__Homework__: Homework #4 is due Monday, 4/6 at 11:59pm. You can find the assignment and turn in your work on BCourses. Start looking for potential data sets for your final project and turn in your final project proposal (due 4/20).
